data.title: Waller supports July rate cut; urges Fed to act before job market weakens. #economy #interestrates
data.description: Christopher Waller, who is being considered for the position of the next chair of the central bank, stated that the Federal Reserve should not delay in lowering interest rates until the labor market shows signs of deterioration.

data.title: Crypto theft hits $2.17B in 2025, incl. $1.5B ByBit hack – Chainalysis reports. Alarming rise in cybercrime.
data.description: The year 2025 has seen a surge in crypto-related crimes, with an alarming total of $2.17 billion stolen up to now. The largest incident involves a $1.5 billion hack on ByBit, as reported by Chainalysis.

data.title: Encore Search Partners recognized as a top executive recruiting firm by Houston Business Journal for 2025.
data.description: Houston-based executive recruiting firm, Encore Search Partners, has surpassed larger competitors in the industry with their high-impact placements and a performance-driven culture. As of July 17, 2025, the firm has achieved a top position on the Houston Business Journal's list of Largest Executive Search Firms. This recognition highlights their success and growth in the market, showcasing their effectiveness in connecting top talent with leading companies in the region. This achievement underscores their commitment to excellence and signifies their prominent presence in the executive search sector.

data.title: DebitMyData™ launches LLM Security API Suite. Founded by Preska Thomas, it aims to set a new AI trust standard.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, DebitMyData™, created by digital sovereignty innovator Preska Thomas, known as the "Satoshi Nakamoto of NFTs," has revealed the worldwide launch of its innovative LLM Security API Suite. This advanced platform merges reinforcement technologies to enhance data protection in transactions.

data.title: Most Australian businesses unprepared for AI despite expecting growth; lack readiness in adoption, data, and ethics.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by EXL revealed that businesses in Australia are anticipating substantial growth in artificial intelligence (AI) usage. However, the survey findings indicate a lack of preparedness in terms of adopting AI, developing robust data strategies, and establishing ethical protocols within these organizations. This suggests that despite the optimistic outlook on AI expansion, many businesses in Australia still have significant barriers to overcome in order to effectively integrate AI technologies into their operations.

data.title: Global South Joint Communication Program launched in Rio de Janeiro on July 16, led by Xinhua News Agency at BRICS Forum.
data.description: On July 16, 2025, during the BRICS Media and Think Tank Forum in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, the inaugural Global South Joint Communication Partnership Program was introduced. Spearheaded by Xinhua News Agency, this initiative aims to foster collaboration among media outlets and think tanks from developing regions. The launch event was attended by representatives from various countries and organizations. This program is set to facilitate exchanges and joint projects among partners, enhancing communication and knowledge-sharing.

data.title: Trump's judicial nominee has ties to cryptocurrency, having represented various blockchain companies in court.
data.description: The nominee chosen by the president to serve on an appellate court overseeing Silicon Valley has provided legal representation for numerous blockchain companies during court proceedings.

data.title: Majestic Ideal Holdings Ltd priced IPO at $6 per share with 2.5M shares, to list on Nasdaq as "MJID" on July 18.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Majestic Ideal Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: MJID), a company offering SCM services in the apparel sector, disclosed the pricing of its initial public offering (the “Offering”). They plan to offer 2,500,000 ordinary shares at $6.00 per share. The Ordinary Shares are scheduled to commence trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market on July 18, 2025, under the symbol “MJID.”

data.title: US launches probe into Brazil’s Pix system as it grows; Trump imposes 50% tariff and orders trade investigation amidst BRICS discussions.
data.description: Following the expansion of Brazil's Pix system and discussions within BRICS regarding the creation of a reserve currency, the United States President, Trump, has announced a significant response. This response includes imposing a 50% tariff and initiating a comprehensive trade investigation. The developments have added tension to the global economic landscape.
